package rulecoverage

import (
	"context"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for external_http_call_inside_transaction_scope.
// Rule intent: Network calls performed while a DB transaction is open.
type ExternalCallModel struct {
	ID           string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	PaymentRef   string `gorm:"column:payment_ref" json:"payment_ref"`
	Status       string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
}

func PositiveExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScope(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, orderID string, amount int) error {
	tx := db.Begin()

	tx.Create(&ExternalCallModel{ID: orderID, Status: "pending"})

	resp, err := http.Get("https://payment-gateway.example.com/charge?amount=" + string(rune(amount)))
	if err != nil {
		tx.Rollback()
		return err
	}
	defer resp.Body.Close()

	body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	paymentRef := string(body)

	tx.Model(&ExternalCallModel{}).Where("id = ?", orderID).Update("payment_ref", paymentRef)

	tx.Commit()
	return nil
}
